description: MCP server for OpenRouter management API: credits, key CRUD, activity drill-down, dashboard.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.oviron/openrouter-admin

environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter Provisioning API key — create at https://openrouter.ai/settings/provisioning. Distinct from inference keys: it can manage your account but cannot make completion calls.
environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_PROVISIONING_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable destructive write tools (or_key_create, or_key_update, or_key_delete). Disabled by default — read-only tools (or_overview, or_credits, or_keys_list, or_key_get, or_activity, or_current_key) are always available.
environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_ADMIN_ALLOW_WRITE
